reason: NVIDIAのJensen Huang CEOがBlackwellとVera Rubinチップで2027年までに1兆ドルの売上を予測しており、AIインフラ需要の爆発的成長を示唆している。TSMCの収益がAI関連で45%超のYoY増加を記録し、Blackwell需要が生産を押し上げている点も強気のサインだ。データセンターの電力消費急増とOpenAIの巨額資金調達が、NVIDIAのGPU需要をさらに後押しする構造的な強さを強調している。
key_signals: Jensen HuangのBlackwell/Vera Rubinで1兆ドル売上予測
TSMCのQ1収益がAI需要でガイダンス超過
AIデータセンターの30GW超電力需要とNVIDIAの支配力強化

- **Original Text**: "One detail most people miss: Nebius is an NVIDIA Reference Platform Cloud Partner. $NVDA Same tier as Azure. $MSFT That means direct access to the latest hardware. Blackwell. Blackwell Ultra. Dynamo. While others wait in line for GPU allocation, Nebius is at the front of it."

#### Latest Post 5 (April 9, 2026)
- **Original Text**: "My read on the Nvidia $NVDA roadmap: Hopper — released Nov 2022 The emergence of modern AI. Blackwell — released into production in late 2024 / early 2025 The era of AI factories and digital agents. Vera Rubin — expected 2H 2026 My bet: this is when humanoids stop feeling like sci-fi and start looking a lot more like C-3PO in the real world. Rubin Ultra — expected 2027 My bet: this is when autonomy and robotics go from impressive demos to serious real-world scale. Feynman — expected 2028 The point where intelligence gets cheap enough to compress the cost of discovery itself — medicine, science, manufacturing, everything. This is not just a chip roadmap. • Hopper taught machines to think. • Blackwell taught them to work. • Rubin may give them bodies. • Rubin Ultra may put them on the roads. • Feynman may turn intelligence into infrastructure."
- **URL**: https://x.com/SmarterEveryDip/status/2042303049843298768
